title: ibatia roulinioides
intro: Ibatia roulinioides is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Ibatia roulinioides or the Mexican starflower. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The root and leaves of the Ibatia roulinioides plant have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for internal use, or as a topical application for skin conditions, and is also used in various herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures.
